name: pythia-sim
description: Run standalone Pythia 8 simulations through a local stdio MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Run standalone Pythia 8 simulations from Codex without manual shell setup
interface.longDescription: Use a local stdio MCP server to inspect configured Pythia roots, auto-build standalone libraries when needed, compile standalone C++ snippets, and run simulations with preserved failure artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Run a standalone Pythia 8 simulation and summarize the output
List my configured Pythia roots and tell me which one is ready
Compile this standalone Pythia example and explain any diagnostics
